announcements_material.title: Material Information
announcements_material.content: Engro Vopak Terminal Ltd (JV of subsidiary Engro Corp) obtained all approvals for renewal of Implementation Agreement with Port Qasim Authority — ECC approval 16-Jun, Federal Cabinet 17-Jun. Positive but ENGROH-specific; watch-name only, not held.

announcements_material.title: Reporting of shares purchased (buy-back)
announcements_material.content: Routine buy-back progress report (scanned image). Buy-back active; watch-name only.

announcements_material.title: Disclosure of Interest by Director/CEO/Executive (insider-interest form, GIF)
announcements_material.content: Insider-interest disclosure form (View-only GIF, no PDF). MTL watch-name only (P-026 not-buy). Per 06-18 lesson, label != content; flagged but MTL not held so non-blocking.
